title: Handmade Trugs, Letterpress Cards & Thoughtful Garden Gifts • Connecticut
announcement: Welcome to Willow & Thorn Crafts! Every piece is made by hand in our Glastonbury, CT studio. We specialize in wooden garden trugs, letterpress stationery, pressed-flower notecards, hand-thrown pottery, and monogrammed garden tools. Perfect gifts for gardeners and book lovers alike. Please allow 1-2 weeks for made-to-order items. Custom monogramming available — just message us!
vacation_message: Currently accepting orders. Response times may be slower in winter months.
sale_message: Thank you so much for your order! We'll begin crafting your piece within 2-4 business days. Each item is handmade with care, so no two are exactly alike. Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions — we love hearing from our customers!
digital_sale_message: Thank you for your purchase. Your digital item will be available immediately.
policy_welcome: Thanks for visiting Willow & Thorn Crafts! We make handmade goods for gardeners, readers, and thoughtful gift-givers in the New England tradition.
policy_payment: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, Etsy gift cards, and PayPal through Etsy's secure checkout. For custom orders over $150, a 50% deposit is required before we begin work.
policy_shipping: All items ship via USPS Priority Mail from Glastonbury, CT 06033. Made-to-order pieces ship within 7-14 business days. Ready-to-ship items go out within 2-3 business days. Fragile pottery and glass items are double-boxed with extra cushioning.
policy_refunds: We want you to love what you receive! If your item arrives damaged, please contact us within 48 hours with photos and we will send a replacement or issue a full refund. Because each piece is handmade, we cannot accept returns for natural variation in wood grain, glaze, or botanical pressing.
